name: sls.tf-typescript-parser
description: TypeScript configuration parser for sls.tf Terraform module
comment: No install is needed at plan time. SAM uses a vendored, tree-shaken js-yaml (vendor/js-yaml/). TypeScript configs run on Node's native TS support (Node >= 22.7) with zero dependencies. Configs that need more than native type-stripping (CommonJS require(), extensionless imports, tsconfig path aliases) can set the SLS_TF_TS_RUNNER env var to a TypeScript runner, e.g. SLS_TF_TS_RUNNER="npx tsx". js-yaml is a devDependency only (offline elemental converter + re-vendoring), never used at plan time.
author: sls.tf
